case_title: LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, INC. VS. HARVEST FIRE INTERNATIONAL et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, INC. A NORTH CAROLINA CORPORATION SERVED JUL-01-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HARVEST FIRE INTERNATIONAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-05-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-15-2003 CONTINUED TO MAR-05-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). JAN-15-2003 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-27-2002 CONTINUED TO JAN-15-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOV-27-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOWE'S HOME CENTERS, INC. A NORTH CAROLINA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HARVEST FIRE INTERNATIONAL $7,789.69 PRINCIPAL, $1,125.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,168.45 INTEREST, $197.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,280.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
